name: PBI_1736268_AIChat_Module

tests.name: Validate Source Data Count in STCCCALQ_GG
tests.description: Ensure the total record count in the source table STCCCALQ_GG matches the expected count.
tests.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG;
tests.expected_behavior: The record count matches the expected count provided in the test data.

tests.name: Validate Staging Table Record Count
tests.description: Ensure the total record count in the staging table STCCCALQ_STG matches the source table STCCCALQ_GG.
tests.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG;
tests.expected_behavior: The record count matches the source table STCCCALQ_GG.

tests.name: Validate Trailer Mapping Logic
tests.description: Verify trailer mapping logic using CDSM_RULE_MAP and TRAILER_REGEX_RULES.
tests.sql: SELECT t.TXN_ID, r.REGEX_PATTERN, t.TRL_VALUE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t JOIN CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_REGEX_RULES r ON t.REGEX_RULE_ID = r.REGEX_RULE_ID WHERE r.REC_TP = 7;
tests.expected_behavior: Trailer values in TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG match the regex patterns defined in TRAILER_REGEX_RULES.

tests.name: Validate Target TXN Data
tests.description: Ensure TXN_TP_CODE and SRC_STM_ID mappings are correctly applied in the target TXN table.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, TXN_TP_CODE, SRC_STM_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72);
tests.expected_behavior: SRC_STM_ID values map to correct TXN_TP_CODE patterns (e.g., 29=S10REC, 30=S10DEL).

tests.name: Validate APA Product Lookups
tests.description: Ensure APA product lookups are correctly populated in the APA table.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE PRODUCT_CODE IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All APA records have valid PRODUCT_CODE values.

tests.name: Validate FIP Data Population
tests.description: Verify FIP table data is populated correctly based on staging transformations.
tests.sql: SELECT FIP_ID, FIP_VALUE FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_VALUE IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All FIP records have valid FIP_VALUE values derived from staging.

tests.name: Validate TXN_RLTNP Relationships
tests.description: Ensure relationships in TXN_RLTNP table are correctly established.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_RLTNP_ID, TXN_ID, RELATED_TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_ID IS NOT NULL AND RELATED_TXN_ID IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All TXN_RLTNP records have valid TXN_ID and RELATED_TXN_ID values.

tests.name: Cross-Layer Reconciliation
tests.description: Reconcile record counts between staging and target layers.
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS staging_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN) AS target_count FROM DUAL;
tests.expected_behavior: Record counts between staging and target layers match.

tests.name: Check for Null Values in Target Tables
tests.description: Ensure no critical columns in target tables have null values.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TP_CODE IS NULL OR SRC_STM_ID IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: No records with null values in critical columns.

tests.name: Negative Test: Invalid SRC_STM_ID
tests.description: Ensure records with invalid SRC_STM_ID values are not loaded into the target TXN table.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_ID NOT IN (29, 30, 71, 72);
tests.expected_behavior: No records with invalid SRC_STM_ID values exist in the TXN table.

tests.name: Validate SRC_STM_ID Mapping in STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Verify that SRC_STM_ID values in STCCCALQ_STG are correctly mapped to their respective TXN_TP_CODE values.
tests.sql: SELECT SRC_STM_ID, TXN_TP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72);
tests.expected_behavior: SRC_STM_ID values map as follows: 29=S10REC, 30=S10DEL, 71=MULBALMT, 72=S10TFRS.

tests.name: Validate LGCY_AC_CGY_CODE Logic for AR_ID in STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Ensure LGCY_AC_CGY_CODE is correctly derived based on AR_ID values.
tests.sql: SELECT AR_ID, LGCY_AC_CGY_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE AR_ID IN (1071, 1029);
tests.expected_behavior: AR_ID=1071 maps to one LGCY_AC_CGY_CODE value, and AR_ID=1029 maps to another.

tests.name: Validate SRC_DR_CR_CD Logic for SHARES in STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Verify that SRC_DR_CR_CD is correctly derived based on SHARES values.
tests.sql: SELECT SHARES, SRC_DR_CR_CD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SHARES >= 0;
tests.expected_behavior: SHARES >= 0 maps to SRC_DR_CR_CD=187; otherwise, SRC_DR_CR_CD=186.

tests.name: Validate TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG Data Population
tests.description: Ensure TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG is populated correctly based on ranked matching in CDSM_RULE_MAP.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_SRC_KEY, TXN_SBTP_CD, TXN_SBTP_ID, EXEC_SBTP_CD, EXEC_SBTP_ID, SRC_PCS_TP_CD, SRC_PCS_TP_ID, CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG;
tests.expected_behavior: All columns are populated based on ranked matching logic in CDSM_RULE_MAP.

tests.name: Validate APA_TP_ID Logic in APA_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Verify APA_TP_ID is correctly assigned based on TXN_TP_CODE values.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_TP_CODE, APA_TP_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.APA_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE TXN_TP_CODE IN ('TS10D999', 'TS10R999', 'TS10T999', 'TSMULB999');
tests.expected_behavior: TXN_TP_CODE values map to APA_TP_ID=318/APASEC79; otherwise, APA_TP_ID=115/APASEC11.

tests.name: Validate CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP Lookup in APA_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Ensure CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP lookup is correctly applied in APA_STCCCALQ_STG.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, PD_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.APA_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE PD_ID IN (SELECT PD_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP);
tests.expected_behavior: PD_ID values in APA_STCCCALQ_STG match those in CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.

tests.name: Validate TXN_TP_CODE Logic in TXN_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Verify TXN_TP_CODE values are correctly derived based on SRC_STM_ID.
tests.sql: SELECT SRC_STM_ID, TXN_TP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 72);
tests.expected_behavior: SRC_STM_ID values map to correct TXN_TP_CODE patterns.

tests.name: Validate EXECSBTP and SRCPCSTP Lookups in TXN_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Ensure EXECSBTP and SRCPCSTP classifications are correctly populated via CL_VAL_VW.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, EXECSBTP_CD, SRCPCSTP_CD FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE EXECSBTP_CD IS NOT NULL AND SRCPCSTP_CD IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: EXECSBTP_CD and SRCPCSTP_CD values are correctly populated based on CL_VAL_VW lookup.

tests.name: Validate MULBALMT Logic in TXN_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Verify SRC_STM_ID=71 (MULBALMT) follows a different transformation path.
tests.sql: SELECT SRC_STM_ID, TXN_TP_CODE FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE SRC_STM_ID = 71;
tests.expected_behavior: SRC_STM_ID=71 follows a distinct transformation path for TXN_TP_CODE derivation.

tests.name: Validate Target TXN Data Population
tests.description: Ensure TXN table is populated correctly based on staging transformations.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, TXN_TP_CODE, SRC_STM_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_ID IN (29, 30, 71, 72);
tests.expected_behavior: All TXN records are populated correctly based on staging transformations.

tests.name: Validate Target APA Data Population
tests.description: Ensure APA table is populated correctly based on staging transformations.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, PRODUCT_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE PRODUCT_CODE IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All APA records have valid PRODUCT_CODE values derived from staging.

tests.name: Validate Target FIP Data Population
tests.description: Ensure FIP table is populated correctly based on staging transformations.
tests.sql: SELECT FIP_ID, FIP_VALUE FROM CCAL_OWNER.FIP WHERE FIP_VALUE IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All FIP records have valid FIP_VALUE values derived from staging.

tests.name: Validate TXN_RLTNP Relationships
tests.description: Ensure relationships in TXN_RLTNP table are correctly established.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_RLTNP_ID, TXN_ID, RELATED_TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_ID IS NOT NULL AND RELATED_TXN_ID IS NOT NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All TXN_RLTNP records have valid TXN_ID and RELATED_TXN_ID values.

tests.name: Cross-Layer Reconciliation
tests.description: Reconcile record counts between staging and target layers.
tests.sql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG) AS staging_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN) AS target_count FROM DUAL;
tests.expected_behavior: Record counts between staging and target layers match.

tests.name: Validate JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST Trailer Parsing
tests.description: Ensure rows in JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST match CDSM_RULE_MAP output for TRAILER, TRANS_TP_CODE, TRANS_SBTP_CODE, EXEC_SBTP_CODE, CNX_IND.
tests.sql: SELECT t.TRAILER, t.TRANS_TP_CODE, t.TRANS_SBTP_CODE, t.EXEC_SBTP_CODE, t.CNX_IND FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST t JOIN CDS_STG_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r ON t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID WHERE r.REC_TP = 7;
tests.expected_behavior: All rows in JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST match the corresponding CDSM_RULE_MAP output.

tests.name: Validate BUS_DY_FLAG Date Adjustment
tests.description: Verify EFFECTIVE_DATE is used directly when BUS_DY_FLAG=1, otherwise next business day is derived from DATE_DIM.
tests.sql: SELECT t.BUS_DY_FLAG, t.EFFECTIVE_DATE, d.NEXT_BUSINESS_DAY FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG t LEFT JOIN CCAL_OWNER.DATE_DIM d ON t.EFFECTIVE_DATE = d.CALENDAR_DATE WHERE t.BUS_DY_FLAG = 0;
tests.expected_behavior: When BUS_DY_FLAG=1, EFFECTIVE_DATE is used directly; otherwise, NEXT_BUSINESS_DAY is derived from DATE_DIM.

tests.name: Validate TXN_SRC_KEY Uniqueness in TXN
tests.description: Ensure TXN_SRC_KEY values in TXN table are unique.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_SRC_KEY, COUNT(*) AS key_count FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN GROUP BY TXN_SRC_KEY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
tests.expected_behavior: No duplicate TXN_SRC_KEY values exist in the TXN table.

tests.name: Validate SRC_STM_CODE Values in TXN
tests.description: Ensure SRC_STM_CODE values in TXN table are valid.
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SRC_STM_CODE FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE SRC_STM_CODE NOT IN ('S10REC', 'S10DEL', 'MULBALMT', 'S10TFRS');
tests.expected_behavior: All SRC_STM_CODE values are valid and within the allowed set.

tests.name: Validate TXN_TP_CD and TXN_SBTP_CD Population
tests.description: Ensure TXN_TP_CD and TXN_SBTP_CD are populated in TXN table.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_TP_CD IS NULL OR TXN_SBTP_CD IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: No records have NULL values in TXN_TP_CD or TXN_SBTP_CD.

tests.name: Validate APA_TP_CD Values in APA
tests.description: Ensure APA_TP_CD values in APA table are correctly assigned as APASEC11 or APASEC79.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_TP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE APA_TP_CD NOT IN ('APASEC11', 'APASEC79');
tests.expected_behavior: All APA_TP_CD values are either APASEC11 or APASEC79.

tests.name: Validate PD_ID Lookup in APA
tests.description: Ensure PD_ID values in APA table are correctly derived from CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, PD_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE PD_ID NOT IN (SELECT PD_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP);
tests.expected_behavior: All PD_ID values in APA table exist in CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.

tests.name: Validate APA Amount Calculations
tests.description: Verify APA amounts are calculated correctly based on SHARES sign.
tests.sql: SELECT APA_ID, SHARES, APA_AMOUNT FROM CCAL_OWNER.APA WHERE (SHARES >= 0 AND APA_AMOUNT < 0) OR (SHARES < 0 AND APA_AMOUNT >= 0);
tests.expected_behavior: APA amounts are positive when SHARES >= 0 and negative when SHARES < 0.

tests.name: Validate FIP Records for STCCCALQ Source
tests.description: Ensure FIP records exist for all corresponding STCCCALQ source records.
tests.sql: SELECT s.SRC_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG s LEFT JOIN CCAL_OWNER.FIP f ON s.SRC_ID = f.SRC_ID WHERE f.FIP_ID IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All STCCCALQ source records have corresponding FIP records.

tests.name: Validate TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD Values
tests.description: Ensure TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD values in TXN_RLTNP table are valid.
tests.sql: SELECT DISTINCT TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD NOT IN ('REL1', 'REL2', 'REL3');
tests.expected_behavior: All TXN_RLTNP_TP_CD values are valid and within the allowed set.

tests.name: Validate Relationship Pairs in TXN_RLTNP
tests.description: Ensure relationship pairs in TXN_RLTNP table are correctly established.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID, RELATED_TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP WHERE TXN_ID IS NULL OR RELATED_TXN_ID IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: No relationship pairs have NULL TXN_ID or RELATED_TXN_ID.

tests.name: Validate MNY_TXN_QUALFR Records Match CDSM_RULE_MAP
tests.description: Ensure MNY_TXN_QUALFR records from SBDI flow match CDSM_RULE_MAP REC_TP=7.
tests.sql: SELECT q.QUALFR_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR q LEFT JOIN CDS_STG_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r ON q.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID WHERE r.REC_TP = 7 AND r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: All MNY_TXN_QUALFR records from SBDI flow match CDSM_RULE_MAP REC_TP=7.

tests.name: Validate No Orphan TXN Without APA or FIP
tests.description: Ensure no TXN records exist without corresponding APA or FIP records.
tests.sql: SELECT t.TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN t LEFT JOIN CCAL_OWNER.APA a ON t.TXN_ID = a.TXN_ID LEFT JOIN CCAL_OWNER.FIP f ON t.TXN_ID = f.TXN_ID WHERE a.APA_ID IS NULL AND f.FIP_ID IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: No TXN records exist without corresponding APA or FIP records.

tests.name: Validate No NULL TXN_SRC_KEY in TXN
tests.description: Ensure no TXN records have NULL TXN_SRC_KEY values.
tests.sql: SELECT TXN_ID FROM CCAL_OWNER.TXN WHERE TXN_SRC_KEY IS NULL;
tests.expected_behavior: No TXN records have NULL TXN_SRC_KEY values.

description: Test coverage generated via db-testing-tool AI Chat Assistant for PBI 1736268 - Trailer Mapping
